title: The Menstrual Cycle
question: What is menstruation? / Apakah haid?
A: Menstruation is the breakdown of the lining of the uterine wall and discharge of blood through the vagina / Haid ialah peluluhan lapisan dinding uterus dan darah yang mengalir melalui faraj
B: Menstruation is the fertilization process between sperm and ovum / Haid ialah proses persenyawaan antara sperma dan ovum
C: Menstruation is the release of a mature egg from the ovary to the uterus / Haid ialah pengeluaran telur matang dari ovari ke uterus

question: Uterine lining breaks down / Lapisan dinding uterus terluluh

Uterine lining starts to rebuild and thicken / 
Dinding uterus mula dibina semula dan menebal
An ovum is released / Ovum dibebaskan

The uterine lining continues to thicken and becomes richly supplied with blood vessels / 
Dinding uterus terus menebal dan kaya dengan salur darah
Ovulation / Pengovulan 通常发生在第几天左右？
Menstruation cycle / Kitaran haid 通常几天？
